entries.raw_en:
ent-TaskVial = vial
    .desc = A special vial, that could be inserted inside a NTRs task console.

ent-TaskBottle = metamorphic glass
    .desc = A normal bottle, that could be inserted inside a NTRs task console.

ent-TaskJug = jug
    .desc = A basic jug for sending a large ammount of chemicals to CentComm.

ent-LibrarianTranslatorImplanter = translator implanter
    .desc = A disposable syringe exclusively designed for the injection of subdermal implants.

ent-ChevalTranslatorImplanter = translator implanter
    .desc = A disposable syringe exclusively designed for the injection of subdermal implants.

ent-BasicSpaceItalianTranslatorImplanter = translator implanter
    .desc = A disposable syringe exclusively designed for the injection of subdermal implants.

ent-AdvancedSpaceItalianTranslatorImplanter = translator implanter
    .desc = A disposable syringe exclusively designed for the injection of subdermal implants.

ent-YowKriolTranslatorImplanter = translator implanter
    .desc = A disposable syringe exclusively designed for the injection of subdermal implants.
ent-SpawnPointGhostSlasher = ghost role spawn point
ent-SpawnPointGhostSlasherToken = ghost role spawn point

ent-ClothingBeltMercWebbingHelldiverFilled = mercenary webbing
    .desc = Ideal for storing everything from ammo to weapons and combat essentials.
ent-OrganMagicSlaughterHeart = demonic heart
ent-SpawnPointGhostSlaughterDemon = ghost role spawn point
ent-SpawnPointGhostLaughterDemon = ghost role spawn point

ent-SpaceLeviathanDespawn = space whale
    .desc = When the space becomes too quiet, there is no hope, there is no escape, but there is this.

ent-DoorElectronicsWizard = door electronics
    .desc = An electronics board used in doors and airlocks.

ent-AirlockUranium = airlock
    .desc = It opens, it closes, and maybe crushes you.

ent-AirlockUraniumGlass = glass airlock
    .desc = It opens, it closes, and maybe crushes you.

ent-AirlockUraniumWizardLocked = airlock
    .desc = It opens, it closes, and maybe crushes you.

ent-AirlockUraniumGlassWizardLocked = glass airlock
    .desc = It opens, it closes, and maybe crushes you.

ent-AirlockUraniumAssemblyGlass = airlock assembly
    .desc = It opens, it closes, and maybe crushes you.

ent-ClothingBackpackWizardClownBundle = giggles von honkerton
    .desc = It's a backpack made by Honk! Co.

ent-ClothingBackpackWizardMimeBundle = mime backpack
    .desc = A silent backpack made for those silent workers. Silence Co.

ent-ClothingBackpackOblivionEnforcerBundle = backpack
    .desc = You wear this on your back and put items into it.

ent-ToolboxTider = mechanical toolbox
    .desc = Are you ready for the new tide order?

ent-ToolboxTiderFilled = mechanical toolbox
    .desc = Are you ready for the new tide order?

ent-ImmovableRodWizardII = immovable rod
    .desc = You can sense that it's hungry. That's usually a bad sign.

ent-ImmovableRodWizardIII = immovable rod
    .desc = You can sense that it's hungry. That's usually a bad sign.

ent-ImmovableRodWizardIV = immovable rod
    .desc = You can sense that it's hungry. That's usually a bad sign.

ent-ImmovableRodWizardV = immovable rod
    .desc = You can sense that it's hungry. That's usually a bad sign.

ent-DrinkMugwortTeaGlass = metamorphic glass
    .desc = A metamorphic glass that automagically turns into a glass appropriate for the drink within. There's a sanded off patent number on the bottom.

ent-CrowbarWizard = crowbar
    .desc = A compact multipurpose tool to pry open doors and destroy stations.

ent-MultiWandWizard = wizard wand
    .desc = Apparently a wand used by the wizard.

ent-MobAngryBeeWizard = bee
    .desc = How nice a bee. Oh no, it looks angry and wants my pizza.

ent-PlayerBorgGeneric = generic cyborg
    .desc = A man-machine hybrid that assists in station activity. They love being asked to state their laws over and over.

ent-PlayerBorgMining = salvage cyborg
    .desc = A man-machine hybrid that assists in station activity. They love being asked to state their laws over and over.

ent-PlayerBorgEngineer = engineer cyborg
    .desc = A man-machine hybrid that assists in station activity. They love being asked to state their laws over and over.

ent-PlayerBorgJanitor = janitor cyborg
    .desc = A man-machine hybrid that assists in station activity. They love being asked to state their laws over and over.

ent-PlayerBorgMedical = medical cyborg
    .desc = A man-machine hybrid that assists in station activity. They love being asked to state their laws over and over.

ent-PlayerBorgService = service cyborg
    .desc = A man-machine hybrid that assists in station activity. They love being asked to state their laws over and over.

ent-PlayerBorgSyndicateMedicalBattery = syndicate medical cyborg
    .desc = A combat medical cyborg. Has limited offensive potential, but makes more than up for it with its support capabilities.

ent-MobStickmanTemp = angry stick man
    .desc = A being from a realm with only 2 dimensions. At least it's trying to stay faced towards you.

ent-MobObserverWizard = observer
    .desc = Boo!

ent-MobCluwneRandom = person
    .desc = A polymorphed unfortunate.

ent-MobGorillaAngry = gorilla
    .desc = Smashes, roars, looks cool. Don't stand near one.

ent-MobGorillaAngryTemp = gorilla
    .desc = Smashes, roars, looks cool. Don't stand near one.

ent-MobGorillaWizard = gorilla
    .desc = Smashes, roars, looks cool. Don't stand near one.

ent-MobMonkeyAngryTemp = monkey
    .desc = New church of neo-darwinists actually believe that EVERY animal evolved from a monkey. Tastes like pork, and killing them is both fun and relaxing.

ent-ProjectileSpellCardRed = enchanted card
    .desc = A piece of paper enchanted to give it extreme durability and stiffness, along with a very hot burn to anyone unfortunate enough to get hit by a charged one.

ent-ProjectileSpellCardPurple = enchanted card
    .desc = A piece of paper enchanted to give it extreme durability and stiffness, along with a very hot burn to anyone unfortunate enough to get hit by a charged one.
